name: MR. PRICE GROUP  RC -,025
summary: Mr Price Group Limited is a South African retailer that sells clothing, sportswear, footwear, homeware and financial services in Africa. The company operates through various retail formats, including Mr Price, Mr Price Sport, Miladys, Sheet Street and Power Fashion. Headquartered in Durban, South Africa, the company caters to a broad customer base with a value-focused business model
